goals.goal: Basic layout exists: index.html loads with a header, task input form, and empty task list area.

checklist: index.html opens in browser without errors
Form has fields: title, priority, project, due date
Empty task list area is visible

goals.goal: User can add a task and see it appear in the list immediately. Data persists after page refresh.

checklist: Fill form and click Add — task appears in list
Refresh the page — task is still there (localStorage)
Task shows title, priority, project name, due date

goals.goal: User can mark a task done and delete a task.

checklist: Click done — task gets a visual completed state
Click delete — task is removed from list and localStorage
Refresh — deleted task stays gone, done task stays done

goals.goal: Search bar filters tasks in real time by title, tag, or project name.

checklist: Type in search bar — list filters instantly
Matches on title, tags, and project name

goals.goal: Dark mode toggle works and preference is saved across page refreshes.

checklist: Toggle switches between light and dark mode
Both modes look clean and readable
